title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sankara Nethralaya - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sankara Nethralaya - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sankara Nethralaya, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sankara Nethralaya:
Sankara Nethralaya is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sankara Nethralaya!
